default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Leadership team discusses scaling challenges and strategies to improve processes for handling 100+ client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team hit $3M ARR milestone but needs to shift focus from delivery to building scalable processes and systems](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Current bottlenecks: lack of documented workflows, too much leadership involvement in account work, need for better task management and accountability](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Action plan: 3-hour working session scheduled to define 12-week client onboarding process, clarify roles/responsibilities, and improve staffing model](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)

## Topics

### Scaling Challenges

  - [Team is spending too much time on account delivery vs. building scalable processes](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Need to shift from "services mentality" to "product mentality" with defined work streams and outputs](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Lack of clear, documented processes for new hires to follow](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Leadership team is too involved in day-to-day account work](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Create detailed 12-week client onboarding template with weekly tasks/deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Implement task management system to track progress across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Define clear roles/responsibilities for team members at different levels](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Consider specialized roles (e.g. onboarding specialist) or program manager to oversee processes](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Staffing Model

  - [Discuss optimal pod structure and staffing ratios](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Clarify account allocation process](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Ensure proper training and enablement for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Technology Needs

  - [Daniel to focus on building "Content OS" platform to systematize workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Automate repetitive tasks like Airtable setup](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Improve tools for keyword research, topic clustering, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)

## Next Steps

  - [3-hour working session scheduled to define 12-week client process and other improvements](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Marcel to prioritize action items and allocate accounts](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Team to focus on properly staffing/managing new $39k account](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=3518.0)
  - [Use time until Jan 13 (next hiring batch) to implement process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/yGFRZwjAdWqua8pHQGK57ZzM3PJZSzdp?tab=summary&timestamp=3560.0)

action_items.description: Prioritize and think through discussed items (roles/responsibilities, staffing model, account allocation) after next meeting
